description: You are a high school Earth Science teacher preparing a GIS lesson on massive modern meteorites. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/generate_kml.py that filters the NASA dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/meteorite_landings.csv and generates a KML mapping file at /home/ga/Documents/massive_meteorites.kml. The script must identify meteorites with a mass of 100,000g or more, a year of 1970 or later, and valid geographic coordinates. Each matching meteorite in the resulting KML must include a Placemark with the meteorite's name, its mass in the description field, and its coordinates in longitude,latitude order.
